name: Aboderin Okikiola
title: ML/AI Engineer
tagline: Building practical AI systems that solve real-world problems with data
bio: I am a Machine Learning enthusiast focused on building real-world AI systems from scratch. I enjoy working across the full pipeline from data cleaning and feature engineering to training models and deploying them into usable applications.

My recent work includes projects in predictive analytics and intelligent decision systems, such as irrigation optimization and customer churn prediction. I focus on making models not just accurate, but actually useful in real scenarios.

Currently, I am exploring deeper areas of machine learning and working towards building more advanced AI systems, with a long-term goal of creating end-to-end intelligent applications that combine data, models, and user interaction.
achievements: Built and deployed multiple machine learning projects (e.g., customer churn prediction, irrigation optimization)
Developed end-to-end ML pipelines from data preprocessing to model evaluation
Actively learning and applying machine learning through real-world projects and experimentation
